---
title: "Scraper"
output: html_document
date: "2025-07-02"
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: console
---

Use the command-line updater when new tournaments are added:

```sh
Rscript scripts/update_ddc_tournament_data.R
```

The scraper functions live in `R/ddc_scraper.R`; this notebook is now for inspection and one-off runs.

```{r setup}
source("R/ddc_scraper.R")
```

Scrape one tournament by ID:

```{r scrape-one, eval=FALSE}
event <- scrape_ddc_event(624)
head(event)
```

Scrape a known range and save the full tournament data:

```{r scrape-range, eval=FALSE}
event_ids <- 1:624
all_tournaments <- scrape_ddc_events(event_ids)

write.csv(
  all_tournaments,
  "data/output/ddc_full_tournament_data.csv",
  row.names = FALSE
)

head(all_tournaments)
```

For routine updates, prefer the script because it automatically starts after the highest existing `TournamentID`, appends newly found rows, removes duplicate tournament/team rows, and updates the team-only CSV.
